economic_notes: Nation carries $136M in demand debt from Bridging Finance Inc. at prime plus 11% (13.95% effective rate) related to investments in affiliates. Affiliates include Chief Peguis Investment Corporation, Peguis Development Corporation, Chief Peguis Investment Trust. Businesses include Peguis Hardware LP, Peguis Foods LP, Peguis Midway LP, Peguis Pharmacy LP. Loan facilities matured June 30, 2021. COVID-19 impacts noted. Flooding receivables of $10,965,502 claimed. CPIT and Surrender Trust excluded from consolidation.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on four bases: (1) unable to confirm demand debt of $136M from Bridging Finance Inc.; (2) flooding receivables of $4,415,502 not susceptible to audit verification; (3) loans to affiliates CPIC/PDC/CPIT of $24,462,550 with uncertain recoverability; (4) completeness of accounts payable related to construction projects unverifiable. Going concern note due to $136M demand debt at 13.95% interest maturing June 30, 2021. Peguis First Nation TLE Trust, Surrender Trust, and Chief Peguis Investment Trust (CPIT) are excluded from consolidation. Nation has flood expenditure claims of $4,415,502 disputed with funders. Provision of $1,202,966 recorded for defaulted member mortgage guarantees. Potential recovery of $3.2M-$5.0M from countersuit against former advisor not recorded.
